ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind, Geothermal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy source (e.g., kW, MW) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the energy source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the energy source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy source was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the energy source (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of day (HH:MM) when the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the energy generation or consumption at the given time */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data point (e.g., weather conditions, maintenance status) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding energy data point */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the energy consumption at the given time */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where consumption occurred */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the consumption (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding energy data point */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the energy generation at the given time */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where generation occurred */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the generation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_generation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data (e.g., PDF, Excel file) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
